heading: Fee for administering or taking oaths, affirmations, and affidavits
label: 2218 Fee for administering or taking oaths, affirmations, and affidavits
text: No officer, agent, or employee of the Department of Agriculture shall demand or accept any fee or compensation whatsoever for administering or taking any oath, affirmation, or affidavit under the authority conferred by .section 2217 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 522 of Title 5Pub. L. 89–554, § 180 Stat. 378Sept. 6, 1966
Department of the Interior PersonnelApplication to Department of the Interior employees, see note under .section 2217 of this title
